cards.front: Name three ways users may interact with digital devices.
cards.back: Speech, keyboard/mouse, gesture, touch, VR, AR or biometrics.
A global communications network using interconnected computers.

cards.front: Name three parts of Internet infrastructure.

cards.back: The structured address/location of a web resource.
Broadband, satellite, fibre, 4G/5G, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth or GIS.
Managing resources, peripherals, spooling, memory, processes, security and user interface.
CLI, GUI, TSI, menu driven, biometric or voice driven interface.

cards.front: What are the six SDLC stages?
cards.back: Investigation, analysis, design, implementation, maintenance and evaluation.
